text.title: Cost-vs-Quality Decision-Log Output Contract
text.summary: The log is a single markdown file (or markdown-per-entry folder) committed to the repo. Each entry has a defined shape.

list.item: decision: imperative sentence describing the change.
cost_delta: expected monthly $ saving or cost.
supersedes: prior entry id if applicable.
active — entry created, change in production, awaiting review.
ratified — review past, kept; observed_impact populated.
reverted — review past, reversed; new entry references.
superseded — replaced by a later decision on the same feature.

antipattern.description: Entry edited after creation (other than corrections marked with strikethrough).
antipattern.reason: Violates r1. Rewrites history; downstream readers cannot trust the log.

antipattern.description: Review-after passes; status still active; no review entry.
antipattern.reason: Violates r4. The decision is unreviewed indefinitely.

antipattern.description: Reversal made by deleting the original entry instead of writing a new superseding entry.
antipattern.reason: Violates r1 AND erases the lesson.

list.item: Entry has stable ID and ISO date.
Feature scope is specific (sub-feature level, not platform-wide).
Provenance link works (Pareto memo, monitoring dashboard, etc.).
